heading: Audit of accounts
label: 7807 Audit of accounts
text: The Service shall maintain a set of accounts which shall be audited by the Comptroller General in accordance with the provisions of chapter 35 of title 31.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4207 of this title1983— substituted “chapter 35 of title 31” for “”.Pub. L. 97–452section 3523 of title 311982— substituted “” for “the Accounting and Auditing Act of 1950”.Pub. L. 97–295section 3523 of title 311975— substituted provisions that the Service maintain a set of accounts which shall be audited by the Comptroller General in accordance with the provisions of the Accounting and Auditing Act of 1950 for provisions that the Service maintain an integral set of accounts which shall be audited annually by the General Accounting Office in accordance with the principles and procedures applicable to commercial transactions as provided by sections 841–869 of Title 31 and that no other audit shall be required.Pub. L. 93–604
